title: Article 133. Conduct unbecoming an officer and a gentleman
doc_html:
§233.  Article 133.  Conduct unbecoming an officer and a gentleman

Any commissioned officer who is convicted of conduct unbecoming an officer and a gentleman shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.

Acts 1974, No. 621, §1.
doc_text:
§233.  Article 133.  Conduct unbecoming an officer and a gentleman
Any commissioned officer who is convicted of conduct unbecoming an officer and a gentleman shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
Acts 1974, No. 621, §1.
